# Chapter 7: Computer architecture  (~120 pp)
- 7.1 Digital logic refresher (10) · 7.2 ISAs and the engineer's view (15) · 7.3 Pipelining, hazards (15) · 7.4 Caches and memory hierarchy (18) · 7.5 Branch prediction, speculation (15) · 7.6 SIMD, vector machines, GPUs (15) · 7.7 Multicore, NUMA (15) · 7.8 Failure section: Spectre, Meltdown, side channels (17)
